dialogue: A marketing mistake? Our picnics are provocative, not perplexing.
visual: Stylish caterer expertly arranges lavish spread under dappled sunshine, using macro lenses for intricate food details and soft, romantic lighting. The scene showcases decadent culinary artistry in high-gloss finish.
Chic couple gazes at stunning sunset over the city skyline, capturing the idyllic moment with wide-angle drone shots amidst golden hour lighting, evoking sheer elegance and romance.

scene_title: Mysterious object reveal: Giant inflatable hotdog
visual: In the midst of elegance, a comically oversized inflatable hotdog emerges incongruously against the sophisticated setup, shot with fast-paced close-ups and wide shots to highlight its absurdity amidst the refined ambiance.
Event planner looks horrified at the hotdog spectacle, framed in frenetic tracking shots and quick zoom-ins, enhancing the comedic nature of the situation within the luxurious outdoor setting.

scene_title: Product resolution: Elegant event planner app interface
visual: Sleek event planner UI reveals flawlessly coordinated picnic setup options, accompanied by dynamic close-ups of touch-screen navigation and user interactions, exuding premium quality and effortless customization for luxe outdoor soirées.
